title: Show Me — PR Review Report
description: Schema for AI PR review agent reports rendered by the pr-review dashboard.

title.description: Report title shown in the header.

subtitle.description: Secondary heading, e.g. team or project name.

reviews.description: All PR review records. The overview derives aggregate stats from this array.

prNumber.description: PR number from the VCS platform.

prTitle.description: PR title as shown in the VCS.

timeToReviewMs.description: Wall-clock time the agent spent reviewing, in milliseconds.

result.description: Review decision posted to the VCS.

hats.description: Names of reviewer personas active during this review, e.g. 'react-expert', 'security-reviewer'.

hatDetails.description: Per-hat findings. Include for detailed drill-down; omit for summary-only reviews.

tokensUsed.description: Total tokens consumed by the agent for this review.

estimatedCostUsd.description: Estimated USD cost for the tokens consumed.

notes.description: Free-text note shown as a callout in the detail view.

name.description: Hat name — must match an entry in the parent review's 'hats' array.

type.description: issue = something wrong; suggestion = optional improvement; praise = good practice noted.

severity.description: Only required for 'issue' type. critical = must fix before merge.

description.description: Human-readable finding, written for the PR author.

line.description: Line number within the file, if applicable.
